def generate_signals(df, params):
    import pandas as pd
    import numpy as np
    import ta
    window = params['window']
    rsi_threshold = params['rsi_threshold']
    atr_multiplier = params['atr_multiplier']
    df['rsi'] = ta.momentum.rsi(df['close'], window=window)
    df['atr'] = ta.volatility.average_true_range(df['high'], df['low'], df['close'], window=window)
    df['support'] = df['low'].rolling(window=window).min()
    df['resistance'] = df['high'].rolling(window=window).max()
    df['signal'] = 0
    df.loc[(df['close'] < df['support'] + atr_multiplier * df['atr']) & (df['rsi'] < rsi_threshold), 'signal'] = 1
    df.loc[(df['close'] > df['resistance'] - atr_multiplier * df['atr']) & (df['rsi'] > 100 - rsi_threshold), 'signal'] = -1
    return df['signal'].astype(int)
rationale: GBP/USD exhibits strong support/resistance levels combined with RSI and ATR indicators to identify potential reversal points.
